claim_types.label: Warranty
claim_types.description: Standard Hyundai warranty repair claim used for warrantable repairs, goodwill-related warranty processing, and normal claim entry tied to complaint, cause, correction, labor, parts, and attachments.
when_to_use: Use when the claim requires complaint, cause, and correction entry.
Use when labor operation lines, part lines, and summary amounts must be entered.
Use when VIN, mileage, causal part, and supporting attachments are needed.

claim_types.label: Campaign
claim_types.description: Campaign or recall claim used when Hyundai publishes a campaign remedy and the dealer is submitting a claim tied to campaign operation code and campaign description.
when_to_use: Use for recall or campaign repairs.
Use when the claim is tied to a campaign op code.
Use when campaign description and technician information must be recorded.
Use when campaign attachment support is needed.

claim_types.label: Rental
claim_types.description: Rental reimbursement claim used when the dealership is submitting transportation-related reimbursement tied to a repaired vehicle claim or qualifying warranty/campaign repair event.
when_to_use: Use when a rental, SRC, 3rd party rental, or similar transportation reimbursement must be claimed.
Use when the repaired vehicle claim and repair order must be tied back to the rental expense.
Use when rental dates, rental type, amount, and rental reason must be documented.

claim_types.label: PDI
claim_types.description: Pre-Delivery Inspection claim used for PDI-related submission tied to RO/VIN, mileage, RO date, and static or dynamic inspection indicators.
when_to_use: Use when the claim is based on pre-delivery inspection completion.
Use when RO, VIN, mileage, and PDI status information must be recorded.

claim_types.label: Resubmit / Returned Claim
claim_types.description: Returned-claim correction workflow used when a previously submitted warranty claim comes back in Return status and must be corrected, explained, and resubmitted.
when_to_use: Use when a submitted warranty claim is returned.
Use when a return code and return message must be reviewed.
Use when dealer reply or correction activity is required before resubmission.
Use when the original warranty claim structure must be reviewed and repaired.
